name: Moss
headline: Blue-yellow-green material color language
summary: A dry blue-yellow-green palette for code interfaces.
positioning: A blue-yellow-green material line inside HearthCode.
audiences: users who prefer drier color worlds
clean charcoal and paper palette preference

constraints.thermalBaseline: clean charcoal substrate, parchment carriers, restrained bronze chrome, and no full-page brown wash
constraints.primaryHueTriad: oxidized blue, dry yellow, and lichen green
constraints.allowWarmPressure: yes, but in disciplined old-gold, olive, and oxidized teal lanes rather than orange heat or full-page sepia
avoid: ui chrome colored like syntax hero accents
